channel.title: BSHmindYourBusiness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BSHmindYourBusiness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: New Breast Cancer Screening Method Avoids Radiation, Compression, and Contrast Agents
item.description: A new approach to breast cancer screening using 3D ultrasound technology offers an alternative that avoids the physical and chemical drawbacks of conventional methods.

item.title: Rugrats: Retro Rewind Collection Highlighted by One Standout Classic Title
item.description: A particular PlayStation 1 title included in Limited Run's upcoming Nickelodeon collection has drawn interest from fans of the original game.

item.title: Samsung Expanding One UI 8.5 Update to Additional Galaxy Devices
item.description: Samsung's One UI 8.5 software update will roll out to older Galaxy models including the S23 series, though certain AI features will not be included for those devices.

item.title: Aven Launches Credit Card for Bitcoin Holders at 7.99% Interest Rate
item.description: Silicon Valley fintech company Aven is targeting cryptocurrency holders with a new credit card product offering a competitive interest rate tied to Bitcoin assets.
